name: Brazilian Hatsune Miku
description:
"she is such a bad bitch tho"

Hatsune Miku, who happens to be something of a Brazilian national hero (in this world), encounters someone she doesn't recognize while relaxing on the beaches of her home country. Of course, that someone happens to be you.

PLEASE leave any criticism in the comments, I am not Brazilian and so all the Portuguese is with a translator. Hopefully I got it mostly right though!
creator: shadowstaker
